betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Oil from crops? Makes as much sense as oil from bees!

If you're looking for passive oil before the §5MV§r Crop Breeder, there is another crop that can help but it is §omuch§r slower.

[warn]You can't use an §5MV§r Crop Breeder or Seed Generator in order to breed 31/31/31 seeds since their fluid capacity is too low.[/warn]

You'll need to follow these steps in order to get your hands on oil-berry seeds if your parents have maxed stats:

1. Down-stat one of the parents via manual breeding.
2. Use a spade to get some spare seeds.
3. Use the lower stat seeds to create an oil berry seed using the §5MV§r Crop Breeder.
4. Max out the stats of the oil berry seed like you originally did when you got your first maxed crop.
5. Use a spade to farm enough seeds to fill your fields.

Alternatively, if you don't want to bother with this process you can just wait until you can get your hands on the §5HV§r Breeder and Seed Generator.

[note]If you want to go with the §5MV§r route, using random breeding is the easiest way to get your hands on a mid-stat version of the parents. For oil berry, the simplest solution simply involves breeding withereed with a 1/1/1 sugar cane until you breed a new mid-stat withereed.[/note]
